description_long: This object is a soft, fabric hat with a rounded, slouchy form and a wide, open base. The material appears to be a textured knit or fleece, giving it a cozy and flexible appearance. The hat is uniformly colored in a medium blue shade, with subtle shading and surface texture visible throughout. There is no visible brim, and the crown is low and gently domed, tapering slightly toward the top. The opening is wide and unstructured, suggesting it is designed to fit snugly over the head. No decorative elements, logos, or embellishments are present on the exterior.
description: A soft, blue, slouchy beanie-style hat with a wide opening and textured fabric surface. It has a rounded, unstructured crown and no visible decorations.
description_view_0: The hat is seen from above, showing its gently domed crown and the subtle surface texture of the fabric.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the hat's low profile and the wide, open base, with the fabric's texture clearly visible.
description_view_2: The underside of the hat is visible, revealing the wide opening and the unstructured, flexible nature of the material.
description_view_3: Another angled view of the open base, emphasizing the slouchy, relaxed fit and the soft, textured fabric.
